name: EZPAWN
description_short: Harvey, IL pawn shop EZPAWN at 468 E 147th St provides quick cash loans on personal items.
description_long:
Located at 468 E 147th St in Harvey, IL, this EZPAWN location serves the community as a standalone pawn shop. The Harvey storefront operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday from 12 PM to 5 PM, offering convenient hours for residents needing quick access to pawn services.

This Harvey location accepts jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and other valuables for immediate loans. The EZPAWN team at 468 E 147th St evaluates items on-site and works directly with customers to determine fair loan amounts. Call 708-331-5995 to discuss your valuables or ask questions about loan terms before visiting the Harvey shop.

Residents of Harvey looking for emergency cash or seeking to sell valuables should bring a valid ID and the items you wish to pawn. The E 147th St location in Harvey is designed for quick transactions with transparent terms and straightforward processes. EZPAWN offers an accessible alternative to traditional lending for those who need immediate cash.
pros: Instant cash on the spot without credit checks—items are evaluated and loans approved same-day
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics provides estimated loan values before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions with online account management
Flexible payment options including layaway with only 10% down and third-party financing up to 12 months
Secure on-site firearm storage with background check facilitation for legal compliance
Wide inventory of pre-owned brand-name merchandise discounted 25-70% off retail prices with daily new arrivals
Extended store hours including evening (7 PM) and Sunday afternoon (5 PM) availability
cons: Pawn loans subject to undisclosed terms, conditions, and fees not detailed on the website
Online payment functionality unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania—limiting convenience for those states
Loss of collateral if loans are not repaid by maturity—pawned items become shop property
Firearm redemption subject to background checks and additional conditions that may prevent reclamation
No specific APR, interest rates, or fee structures disclosed on the website for loan terms
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who own valuable items and prefer collateral-based lending over credit
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, and merchandise
Gun owners looking to temporarily raise funds against firearms with secure storage
Individuals seeking flexible payment options through layaway or extended payment plans for purchases
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for customers needing quick cash against collateral who own valuable items and prefer the pawn model to credit-based borrowing. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve loss of collateral if unpaid, and specific terms, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed online—making it essential to discuss individual loan terms with store staff before pledging items.
services: Pawn loans on personal property in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert appraisal
Firearms loans and purchases with secure on-site storage
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts
Layaway program with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party "Take Today" financing with flexible payment terms up to 12+ months
Online shop with daily new arrivals and inventory browsing
Instant Quote tool for electronics providing estimated loan values
EZ+ Rewards Program with points earning and online account management
Product Protection Plans for computers, audio/video equipment, and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning/repairs
Pawn extension and layaway online payment capabilities
meta_description: Harvey, IL EZPAWN pawn shop at 468 E 147th St offers quick cash for valuables.
